entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0007 (PS418) awarded to A T AND T CORPORATION (4710), was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 2

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 2

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: 1. ADDITION OF SHARED ETHERNET CLINS AS DETAILED IN SUBMITTAL AU2143.01S. 2. ADDITION OF OC3 ACCESS CLINS AS DETAILED IN SUBMITTAL AU2144.01E. 3. ADDITION OF SED MANUFACTURER NAME UPDATE AS DETAILED IN SUBMITTAL AU2169.01. 4. ADDITION OF CUSTOM ACCESS ARRANGEMENT ICB CASE NUMBERS AND CLINS, IN ACCORDANCE WITH SUBMITTAL AU2187.01E 5. ADDITION OF NETSCOUT WIRELINE SEDS, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU2173.01E 6. ADDITION OF RIVERBED SEDS, AS DETAILED IN SUBMITTAL AU2186.01E 7. THE TOTAL ESTIMATED DOLLAR VALUE OF THE CONTRACT IS UNCHANGED BY THIS MODIFICATION. 8. ALL SUBMITTALS BEING ADDED TO THE CONTRACT ARE EXCLUSIVE OF COVER LETTERS AND ANY SUPPORTING DOCUMENTATION SUBMITTED TO THE NHC.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- TELECOMMUNICATIONS AND TRANSMISSION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:vendorHeader.ns1:vendorDoingAsBusinessName: A T AND T COMM SVCS INTL

entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0007 (PS419) awarded to A T AND T CORPORATION (4710), was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 2

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 2

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
TO ADD IPS DOMESTIC PORT PRICES, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU2145.01E.
2. TO ADD CCS PRICES, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU2146.01E.
3. TO ADD MNS PRICES, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU2150.03E.
4. TO ADD IPS FEATURE PRICES, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU2152.01E.
5. TO ADD WIRELINE SEDS PRICES, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU2172.01E.
6. ADDITION OF WIRELINE SEDS CLINS AS DETAILED IN SUBMITTAL AU2177.01E.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:vendorHeader.ns1:vendorDoingAsBusinessName: A T AND T COMM SVCS INTL

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
1. TO ADD ACCESS SHARED ETHERNET PRICES, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU2155.01E.
2. TO ADD ACCESS SHARED ETHERNET PRICES, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU2156.01E.
3. TO ADD PREMISE WIRING PRICES, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU2171.01E.
4. TO ADD CISCO SED PRICES, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU2195.01E.

entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0007 (PS422) awarded to A T AND T CORPORATION (4710), was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 2

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 2

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: 1. TO ADD MPLS PORT AS PART OF THE NBIP-VPNS FEATURE, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU2158.01E. 2. TO ADD INDIVIDUAL CASE BASIS (ICB) 10 GBPS ETHERNET PRIVATE LINE SERVICE (EPLS) UNDER NSC, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU2162.01E. 3. TO ADD 5 GBPS AND 10 GBPS ACCESS AND PORT FOR THE SHARED ETHERNET ACCESS SERVICE, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU2163.01E. 4. TO ADD MANAGED NETWORK SERVICES (MNS) PRICES FOR POOLED DATA PLANS, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU2165.01E. 5. TO ADD ONE (1) 100 MBPS DAA ETHERNET ACCESS PRICE AND TWO (2) PRICE REDUCTION, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU2170.01P. 6. TO ADD INDIVIDUAL CASE BASIS (ICB) OC-3 (155 MBPS) ACCESS SERVICE, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU2180.01E.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- TELECOMMUNICATIONS AND TRANSMISSION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:vendorHeader.ns1:vendorDoingAsBusinessName: A T AND T COMM SVCS INTL

entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0007 (PS423) awarded to A T AND T CORPORATION (4710), was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 2

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 2

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO REFLECT THE FOLLOWING CHANGES: 1. TO ADD MNS, AS DESCRIBED SUBMITTAL AU2164.01E. 2. TO ADD SHARED ETHERNET ACCESS, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU2166.01S. 3. TO ADD SHARED ETHERNET ACCESS, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU2176.01S. 4. TO ADD ICB CSDES CLINS AND PRICES, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU2196.01E. 5. TO ADD CUSTOMER CONTACT CENTER SERVICES, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU2201.01E. 6. TO UPDATE SED DNRC AND DMRC CLINS, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU2208.02S. 7. THE TOTAL ESTIMATED DOLLAR VALUE OF THE CONTRACT IS UNCHANGED BY THIS MODIFICATION. 8. ALL SUBMITTALS BEING ADDED TO THE CONTRACT ARE EXCLUSIVE OF COVER LETTERS AND ANY SUPPORTING DOCUMENTATION SUBMITTED TO THE NHC.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- TELECOMMUNICATIONS AND TRANSMISSION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:vendorHeader.ns1:vendorDoingAsBusinessName: A T AND T COMM SVCS INTL

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
1. ADDITION OF WIRELINE SEDS AS DETAILED IN SUBMITTAL AU2217.01E.
2. ADDITION OF WIRELINE SEDS, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU2207.01E.
3. PRICE REDUCTION FOR MNS CLIN AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU2178.01P.
4. THE TOTAL ESTIMATED DOLLAR VALUE OF THE CONTRACT IS UNCHANGED BY THIS MODIFICATION.
5. ALL SUBMITTALS BEING ADDED TO THE CONTRACT ARE EXCLUSIVE OF COVER LETTERS AND ANY SUPPORTING DOCUMENTATION SUBMITTED TO THE NHC.
